parameters: I'm sick of having to uphold my reputation as a Sage! Hey, sister!
Bring me some booze! Let's get drunk!
I came to work at the temple because I admired the Sage.
He was a very strict man until just recently...
What's happened to him!? He started treating me like a woman all
of a sudden! My heart won't stop pounding!
We can get outside here, but I think we should investigate inside
the temple a bit more first.
I sometimes see strange girls lurking near the temple, but they
haven't been around lately. I wonder where they went.
Gardemon's become a Sage. My job's to keep an eye on him,
so I followed him here, but...
No matter how many times I warn him, he refuses to give it up.
Where does he get all that enthusiasm from?
We disarmed the pitfalls that were here. We figured we could just
This place could end up becoming a battlefield, and we wouldn't be
demons if we didn't use every weapon we could get our hands on.
I wonder what's going on with the Sage lately. When our eyes
met this morning, he held up his hand for a high five.
Still... Ehehe... It's really nice to start the day with such
